items.label: Patient Received by ACO
items.description: ACO meets patient at arrival point (airport, station, or centre entrance)

items.label: Check-in Documentation Completed
items.description: All arrival documents reviewed and filed

items.label: Consent Forms Signed
items.description: Final consent forms signed in person at the centre

items.label: Room Allocated
items.description: Patient assigned to their room and room briefing given

items.label: Treatment Schedule Confirmed
items.description: Printed/digital schedule shared with patient and confirmed

items.label: Admitted to Panchakarma Program
items.description: Patient officially entered into the Panchakarma program records
